svg.title: Living room memory fragment (apartment two)
svg.desc: Cropped vignette: a temporarily-assembled living room. A small CRT television on a milk-crate stand glows at center-left. The arm of a thrifted couch pushes in from the right. A folding chair holds a draped hoodie. Stacked moving boxes lean against the wall. A power strip and a cord snake lie across the floor. A framed picture is propped against the wall, not yet hung. Channels rotate. Boxes rearrange. The shadows do not move with the bodies.
